description_long: This is a two-story stone house with a prominent wraparound wooden balcony on the upper floor and a stone-tiled hip roof. The exterior walls are constructed from gray stone blocks with horizontal wooden trim, and the roof features a small dormer with a weather vane and a blue solar panel. The ground floor has a covered porch area with benches and a paved stone walkway leading to the main entrance. Windows are rectangular and symmetrically arranged, with blue-tinted glass. The house sits on a grassy base bordered by a stone path, giving it a rustic yet urban-friendly appearance.
description: A two-story stone house with a wraparound wooden balcony, hip roof, and symmetrical blue windows, set on a grassy base with a stone walkway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, covered porch, and wraparound balcony with wooden railings.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the blue solar panel on the roof and the symmetrical window arrangement.
description_view_2: Rear view with a plain stone wall, a single window, and the balcony extending around the side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the gabled balcony section and two benches on the stone walkway.
attribute_entryway_design: Central wooden door with a covered porch, stone steps, and wooden balcony above
